ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (positivity) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composer of the track */,
  "lyricist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lyricist of the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Text of the lyrics for the track */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the time signature detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_lyricist_id FOREIGN KEY ("lyricist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the artist (e.g., solo, band) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the artist, if applicable */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of origin of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genres FOREIGN KEY ("genres") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_artists" (
  "track_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-artist relationship */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., primary, featured) */,
  "credit_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist as credited on the track */,
  "is_lead_artist" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist is the lead artist on the track */,
  "vocal_instrument" TEXT /* Type of contribution (vocal, instrument, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_artists_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the album */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's image */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary artist for the album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label that released the album */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a compilation */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_tracks" (
  "album_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album-track relationship */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number in a multi-disc album */,
  "is_bonus_track" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track is a bonus track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, content manager, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography or profile description */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, artists) */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tracks" (
  "user_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-track interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has listened to the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user to the track */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the user last played the track */,
  "added_to_playlist" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track has been added to a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist where the track is added */,
  "playback_position_ms" INTEGER /* Playback position in milliseconds when the track was last paused */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre, if applicable */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the genre's icon or image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
